name: adr-kit
description: Drop-in Architecture Decision Record toolkit for AI coding agents. Three operating modes: /adr-kit:init for one-shot project bootstrap (audit + ADR generation + pre-commit hook); pre-commit verification via bin/adr-judge against declarative Enforcement blocks; on-demand /adr-kit:adr authoring and /adr-kit:judge in-session review. Skill, adr-generator subagent, lint and migrate commands, path-specific coding and review instructions.
